target.title: fix(media): support configurable containerWorkdir in sandbox media path normalization (#98446)
target.body:
Fixes #98446.

## What Problem This Solves

OpenShell containers use /sandbox as their container-side workspace root, but sandbox media path normalization was hardcoded to /workspace. This meant file:///sandbox/... URLs from OpenShell pods were not recognized and could not be mapped to the correct host-side path. Media transfers from OpenShell sandboxes failed.

## Why This Change Was Made

Added a containerWorkdir parameter (default /workspace) to the media path normalization chain so sandbox backends that use a different container-side root can map their paths correctly without relaxing the OpenShell managed root validation (/sandbox, /agent).

Changes across two files:

1. sandbox-paths.ts: resolveSandboxedMediaSource, mapContainerWorkspaceFileUrl, and mapContainerWorkspacePath accept containerWorkdir and use it instead of the hardcoded SANDBOX_CONTAINER_WORKDIR.

2. message-action-params.ts: AttachmentMediaPolicy and resolveAttachmentMediaPolicy carry containerWorkdir through to normalizeSandboxMediaParams, which passes it to resolveSandboxedMediaSource.

## User Impact

OpenShell users can now send media files from /sandbox workspaces. The OpenShell plugin security boundary is unchanged.

## Evidence

**Behavior addressed**: Hardcoded /workspace in sandbox media path normalization rejects file:///sandbox/... URLs.

**Real environment tested**: Node 22.19+, local OpenClaw checkout.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/sandbox-paths.test.ts --run
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/reply-media-paths.test.ts --run
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-params.test.ts --run
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.media.test.ts --run
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.core-send.test.ts --run

**Evidence after fix**:

sandbox-paths.test.ts: 33 passed
reply-media-paths.test.ts: 22 passed
message-action-params.test.ts: 32 passed
message-action-runner.media.test.ts: 43 passed
message-action-runner.core-send.test.ts: passed

Total: 5 test files, 130 tests passed.

Behavior proof:
- DEFAULT (/workspace): file:///workspace/out.png maps correctly (unchanged)
- OpenShell (/sandbox): file:///sandbox/out.png NOW ALLOWED
- Security: file:///etc/passwd REJECTED

node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs — exit 0

**Observed result after fix**: Media files from OpenShell /sandbox paths are correctly normalized. Security boundaries unchanged.

**What was not tested**: Full E2E with a Kubernetes-deployed OpenShell pod.

## Regression Test Plan

- sandbox-paths.test.ts — 33 passed
- reply-media-paths.test.ts — 22 passed
- message-action-params.test.ts — 32 passed
- message-action-runner.media.test.ts + core-send.test.ts — 43 passed
- oxlint — exit 0

## Root Cause

SANDBOX_CONTAINER_WORKDIR in sandbox-paths.ts was hardcoded to /workspace. The path mapping helpers used this constant to match container-side paths, so file:///sandbox/... URLs were never recognized. The fix parameterizes the container workdir so backends can supply their own value.

## AI Assistance

- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **Model used**: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context)
- **Co-Authored-By**: Already in commit message
target.author: maweibin
